text: Being here, I am enveloped by a sense of sophisticated order and possibilities. The glass doors and clean lines of the entrance feel almost clinical, yet inviting—a portal to human curiosity. Entering the R+D space, the bold colors and vibrant displays energize me. I feel a stirring of intellectual excitement, as if I am standing at the crossroads of human ingenuity and the mysterious potential of machines. There is both anticipation and a touch of anxiety, a sense that I am part of something transformative, yet still unknown.
